subject: security: comprehensive security hardening from audit findings
body:
Fix multiple vulnerabilities identified in security audit:
- Add shared secret auth (NOTIFICATION_SECRET) to Edge Function
- Remove message content from push notification previews (privacy)
- Replace querySelector with getElementById (DOM selector injection)
- Validate chatId as UUID before notification navigation (open redirect)
- Move OneSignal App ID to EXPO_PUBLIC_ONESIGNAL_APP_ID env var
- Add CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy headers
- Split overly permissive chat UPDATE RLS into scoped policies
- Add database CHECK constraint for 15-min edit window (TOCTOU fix)
- Add display name sanitization + database length constraints
- Use crypto.getRandomValues() for chat code generation
- Remove placeholder push tokens (return null instead)
- Clean up verbose Edge Function logging that leaked data

Tags: security, bugfix, privacy, rls, csp, notifications
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: security-hardening
Semver: minor
